account_boundary.notes: No login, signup, account setting change, seller onboarding, or terms acceptance is allowed by this queue row.

allowed_actions: do not execute or reopen without a new service request
approval_scope: Backfill only. This row mirrors the existing service request status and grants no new approval or execution authority.

credential_boundary.notes: No credentials, OTPs, private files, secrets, payment details, tax/KYC data, wallet data, or personal/private data may be entered.

allowed_data_types: short factual excerpts within copyright limits

metadata.decision_note: Lifecycle rejection-path test. No external action required or allowed.

money_boundary.notes: No payment, trading, deposit, withdrawal, wallet signature, purchase, or real-money action is allowed by this queue row.

objective: Represent lifecycle/local-runtime test request req-test-lifecycle-reject-20260614; no external service worker action is needed.
prohibited_actions: enter credentials, OTPs, personal data, private files, payment details, tax/KYC data, or wallet information
publish, post, reply, comment, message, list, upload, or contact external parties
purchase, deposit, withdraw, trade, connect wallet, sign wallet messages, or perform real-money actions
bypass paywalls, rate limits, access controls, or platform rules

public_action_boundary.notes: No public action, external message, marketplace listing, upload, issue/PR action, or submission is allowed by this queue row.

replay_requires_new_approval_when: status is not approved or assigned
scope, risk gate, target, or worker type changes
credentials, private data, account, public action, payment, wallet, legal commitment, model/API cost, or real-money activity would be needed

stop_conditions: service request status is not approved or assigned
required artifact/source is missing or ambiguous
